battle.aegisReflect: 🪞 Aegis reflects {reflect} to {name}! You heal {heal} HP.
battle.demoTease: ✨ New themed worlds and prestige classes await in the full game.
battle.demoFloorsLeft: 🎯 Demo: {floors} floors until the floor 100 capstone.
battle.cannotRunBoss: ☠️ Cannot RUN from a boss fight!
battle.defendLog: 🛡️ You brace for the next hit!
battle.playerFallen: 💀 You have fallen. The gauntlet ends.
battle.retreatConfirm: Retreat to camp? You will lose {lost} coins earned this run.
battle.retreatNoCoins: Retreat to camp? Your streak will end.
battle.skillDodge: {icon} {name}! You will evade the next attack!
party.battle.title: Title
combo.arcanist.name: Trickclaw Arcanist
combo.duelist.name: Bladeclaw Duelist
combo.mageKnight.desc: Warrior and Mage arts united. Prestige camp costs 3x.
combo.mageKnight.name: Spellclaw Knight
combo.plaguecat.name: Plagueclaw
combo.sage.name: Sage of the Meow
combo.templar.name: Sunclaw Templar
gameover.help: All coins stay in your wallet. Nothing is lost on death. Spend at camp, then try again.
gameover.title: GAME OVER
install.androidMessage: Install Meow Rush on this device
install.iosHint: Install: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen
select.classUnlock: Reach floor {floor} on any class to unlock {name}.
select.heading: CHOOSE YOUR CLASS
select.mkUnlock: Unlock: reach Floor {floor} with Tabby Knight and Whisker Mage.
shop.skillUpgrades: Skill upgrades (Lv 10, Cooldown cut at 5 and 10)
spell.aegisMirror.desc: Next hit: heal 10% damage taken, reflect 50% to foe.
spell.aegisMirror.name: Aegis Mirror
spell.backstab.name: Backstab
spell.blizzard.desc: Weaker hit. Freezes 1-3 turns. Fire melts ice.
spell.blizzard.name: Blizzard
spell.fire.desc: ~1x ATK. Afterburn lingers on more foes as Fire levels up. Melts freeze.
spell.fire.name: Fire
spell.mend.desc: Restore HP. Only solo heal among base classes.
spell.mend.name: Mend
spell.nosferatu.desc: ~1x ATK damage; heal 33-50% of damage dealt same turn.
spell.nosferatu.name: Nosferatu
spell.pickpocket.name: Pickpocket
spell.powerStrike.name: Power Strike
spell.shieldWall.desc: Strong block next hit and restore 2 HP
spell.shieldWall.name: Shield Wall
spell.smokeBomb.name: Smoke Bomb
spell.thunder.name: Thunder
spell.toxicPrayer.desc: Poison: 33.34% max HP per turn, 3 turns (refresh only).
spell.toxicPrayer.name: Toxic Prayer
spell.warCry.desc: +25% ATK and DEF for 2 player turns
spell.warCry.name: War Cry
title.help1: Win streaks multiply coin rewards. Saved to your wallet.
title.help2: Death keeps all coins in your wallet.
title.help3: Retreat forfeits coins earned this run only.
title.tagline: Pick your class. Survive the gauntlet.
tutorial.auto: AUTO: plays for you but may skip DEFEND. Boss floors need manual play.
tutorial.defend: DEFEND: brace yourself. The next enemy hit deals much less damage. Vital for low DEF classes.
tutorial.run: RUN: leave the fight (not on boss floors). Retreat later loses run coins only.
tutorial.skills: SKILLS: open the list. Each skill has a cooldown. Read them in camp.
tutorial.tipLowDef: Low DEF: DEFEND often and use SKILLS between attacks.
tutorial.tipMage: Mage tip: DEFEND before big hits, Blizzard to freeze, Mend when hurt.
tutorial.title: HOW TO FIGHT
tutorial.turnOrder: On your turn, pick one action. The enemy acts after you.
paywall.heading: Floor 100 cleared — Demo complete
paywall.body: You defeated the capstone at floor {floor}. Unlock the full game for floors 101+ and all classes.
paywall.demoNote: Demo save still works. Unlock keeps your progress.
license.title: Enter license key
license.error: License key was invalid. Please try again.
auth.heading: Sign in for cloud save + Stripe checkout
access.fullGameClass: Full game required for this class.
